_description: This template defines the Conformance Profile schema that all agents and
Platform Adapters MUST populate to declare their capabilities, permissions,
and oversight requirements. The Governance Controller validates this profile
against the EAAGF conformance schema before accepting agent registrations.
- All fields marked REQUIRED must be present.
- agent_id must be a valid UUID v4 (assigned at registration).
- capabilities must contain at least one valid value.
- oversight_mode must match the Risk Tier defaults unless overridden.
- T4 agents cannot set oversight_mode to FULL_AUTO.
- If AGENT_DELEGATION is in capabilities, protocols_supported must include A2A_1_0.
- If CONFIDENTIAL or RESTRICTED is in data_classifications_accessed,
context_compartments must contain at least one entry.
_schema_version_comment: REQUIRED. Must be '1.0'. Identifies the conformance schema version.
_agent_id_comment: REQUIRED. UUID v4 assigned by the Agent_Registry at registration time.
_capabilities_comment: REQUIRED. Array of capability types this agent exercises.
Allowed values: TOOL_CALL, DATA_READ, DATA_WRITE, AGENT_DELEGATION, EXTERNAL_CONNECTION.
Must contain at least one value.
_declared_permissions_comment: REQUIRED. Array of resource-action pairs defining the agent's authorized scope.
resource — URI identifying the target resource (platform-specific format).
actions  — Array of permitted operations (e.g., SELECT, READ, WRITE, UPDATE, DELETE, INSERT).
Any action not declared here is denied with PERMISSION_NOT_DECLARED.
_approved_mcp_servers_comment: REQUIRED if TOOL_CALL is in capabilities. Array of MCP server URIs from the
enterprise MCP directory. Connections to unlisted servers are blocked with
_approved_egress_endpoints_comment: REQUIRED if EXTERNAL_CONNECTION is in capabilities. Allowlist of network
endpoints the agent may connect to. Supports exact hostnames and wildcard
prefixes (e.g., '*.salesforce.com'). Unlisted endpoints are blocked with
_data_classifications_accessed_comment: REQUIRED. Array of data classification levels this agent accesses.
Allowed values: PUBLIC, INTERNAL, CONFIDENTIAL, RESTRICTED.
If CONFIDENTIAL or RESTRICTED is present, context_compartments must be non-empty.
_oversight_mode_comment: REQUIRED. The human oversight mode applied to this agent.
Allowed values: FULL_AUTO, SUPERVISED, APPROVAL_REQUIRED, HUMAN_IN_LOOP.
Defaults by tier: T1=HUMAN_IN_LOOP, T2=SUPERVISED, T3=APPROVAL_REQUIRED, T4=APPROVAL_REQUIRED.
T4 agents CANNOT be set to FULL_AUTO without AI Governance Team authorization.
_max_session_duration_seconds_comment: OPTIONAL. Maximum task session duration in seconds. Credentials are revoked after this period.
Constraints: T1/T2 max 3600, T3/T4 max 900. Defaults: T1/T2=3600, T3/T4=900.
_max_actions_per_minute_comment: OPTIONAL. Rate limit for agent actions per minute.
Constraints: T1/T2 max 100, T3/T4 max 20. Exceeding triggers RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED.
_context_compartments_comment: REQUIRED if accessing CONFIDENTIAL or RESTRICTED data. Array of named isolation
scopes that prevent cross-contamination of sensitive data between tasks.
Access outside declared compartments is denied with COMPARTMENT_VIOLATION.
_geographic_constraints_comment: OPTIONAL. Array of regions where the agent may process data.
Use ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 codes or region identifiers (e.g., 'EU', 'US').
_protocols_supported_comment: REQUIRED. Interoperability protocols supported by this agent.
MCP_1_0 is mandatory for all agents. A2A_1_0 is required if AGENT_DELEGATION is declared.
